Prepares a QEMU SPI image file and includes a build script for compiling the qemu_spi_cooker program.

## Folders
- **[src](src/README.md)**: Prepares a QEMU SPI image file by initializing and populating a fake SPI flash.

## Files
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build script for compiling the qemu_spi_cooker program with specified sources, includes, and defines.
